name: BreachRecord
description: A disclosed or detected data breach incident affecting a named organization, describing the affected service, date, data classes exposed, and source attribution.

name.description: Canonical identifier for the breach used by the publishing service.

title.description: Human-readable display title for the breach.

domain.description: Primary domain of the breached service.

breach_date.description: Date the breach is believed to have occurred.

added_date.description: Date and time the breach was added to the source dataset.

modified_date.description: Date and time the breach record was last modified.

pwn_count.description: Number of accounts affected by the breach.

description.description: Narrative description of the breach, root cause, and impact.
description.example: In October 2013, 153 million Adobe accounts were breached including encrypted passwords and password hints stored in clear text.

data_classes.description: Categories of personal data exposed in the breach.

source.description: Origin or attribution of the breach data.

verified.description: Whether the publishing service has independently verified the breach.

sensitive.description: Whether the breach is flagged as sensitive (adult content, political, health, etc).

retired.description: Whether the breach has been retired from the dataset.

is_fabricated.description: Whether the breach data is suspected to be fabricated rather than authentic.

is_stealer_log.description: Whether the record originates from an infostealer malware log corpus.

logo_path.description: URL to a logo representing the breached service.
